Calcium

  • Easy Integration: Effortlessly incorporate BHB into your daily routine, whether it's in your morning smoothie or workout beverage.
  • Quality Assurance: Manufactured in a GMP-Compliant facility and 3rd-party tested.

Potassium

Sodium

  • 250g Container: A generous supply of Sodium BHB powder, ensuring you have enough to support your routine.
  • Unflavored Versatility: This unflavored powder allows for seamless integration into various beverages and recipes without altering taste.
  • Premium Quality: Crafted from high-quality sources, providing a reliable source of exogenous ketones.

Magnesium
